title: Vulcano
writer: Renzo Avanzo, Mario Chiari, Piero Tellini
actors: Anna Magnani, Rossano Brazzi, Geraldine Brooks
plot: The prostitute Anna returns to her home, a volcanic island off the coast of southern Italy. Rossano, a procurer for a prostitution ring sets his cap for Anna's beautiful sister. When Anna wants to do something drastic the Volcano ...
